intel.title: [CISA KEV] Cisco IOS - Cisco IOS Cross-Site Request Forgery Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2008-4128
廠商: Cisco
產品: IOS
漏洞名稱: Cisco IOS Cross-Site Request Forgery Vulnerability
說明: Cisco IOS 12.4 contains multiple cross-site forgery vulnerabilities that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands via (1) a certain "show privilege" command to the /level/15/exec/- URI, and (2) a certain "alias exec" command to the /level/15/exec/-/configure/http URI.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-16
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: 此情資指出 Cisco IOS 12.4 版本存在跨網站請求偽造（CSRF）漏洞（CVE-2008-4128），允許遠端攻擊者執行任意指令。此漏洞為 2008 年發布之舊漏洞，雖已被列入 CISA KEV，但威脅時效已久。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產中僅包含一台「Cisco WS-C2960S-48TS-L」網路交換器，且目前狀態為「已停用」。建議維持該設備之停用狀態，若未來需重新啟用，請務必更新其 IOS 韌體至安全版本，並關閉 Web 管理介面（HTTP/HTTPS 服務）以防範此類攻擊。
affected_assets: 資訊設備-網路交換器-Cisco WS-C2960S-48TS-L
